sw_turbo_assembler_c64.name: Turbo Assembler (C64)
sw_turbo_assembler_c64.description: Cycle-accurate 6502 macro assembler with copper-list syntax extensions. Indispensable for raster tricks.

sw_sid_wizard.name: SID-Wizard
sw_sid_wizard.description: Tracker-style SID composer with envelope arpeggio macros. Loops SID thru ADSR sweeps.

sw_devpac_3.name: DevPac 3 (ST/Amiga)
sw_devpac_3.description: Motorola 68000 assembler with debug symbols and Blitter-aware optimization pragmas.

sw_octamed_pro.name: OctaMED Pro
sw_octamed_pro.description: Eight-channel Amiga tracker with stereo PCM recording and full VST-style buses.

sw_deluxe_paint_4.name: Deluxe Paint IV
sw_deluxe_paint_4.description: The Amiga pixel artist's right hand. HAM mode animations, copper gradients, anti-aliased scope.

sw_fasttracker_2.name: FastTracker II
sw_fasttracker_2.description: DOS tracker that pushed Gravis Ultrasound to the limit. Modular patterns, sample-accurate timing.

sw_tasm_5.name: TASM 5.0
sw_tasm_5.description: 32-bit flat-mode assembler with MMX-aware macros. The wizard's choice for 4K voxel intros.

sw_modplug_tracker.name: MODPlug Tracker
sw_modplug_tracker.description: Tracker + VST plugin host. Lets demo crews reuse pirated VSTs in their own miniature synth stubs.

sw_photoshop_5.name: Photoshop 5 LE
sw_photoshop_5.description: Limited Photoshop release with bundled Kodak CMS. Used by intro crews to author texture sets for shaders.

sw_exe_cranker.name: EXE Cranker 1.6
sw_exe_cranker.description: LZSS + Huffman executable packer aimed at the 4KB intro category. Pairs with apack against movfuscation.

sw_msvc_6_lean.name: Visual C++ 6.0 Lean Build
sw_msvc_6_lean.description: Trims Microsoft's reference IDE down to the linker + assembler bytes for 4KB / 64KB intros.

sw_cranker_cruncher.name: APACK Cranker 3.0
sw_cranker_cruncher.description: Latest apack lineage — squeezes entire shaders under bytewise limits while preserving fast startup.
